game.title: Guess Where I Am
game.instructions: Take a photo of your surroundings and I'll guess exactly where you are in Cancun.
game.question1: Are there many people around you?
game.question2: Can you see the sea from here?
game.question3: Are there many buses passing by?
game.guess: I got it! You are at:
welcome.step1.title: Welcome to MueveCancún
welcome.step1.desc: The definitive public transport guide. Routes, maps, and up-to-date fares.
welcome.step2.title: 100% Offline
welcome.step2.desc: Once installed, you don't need signal. Search engine and maps live on your device.
welcome.step3.title: Local Intelligence
welcome.step3.desc: We calculate routes in milliseconds using WebAssembly to save your battery.
welcome.step4.title: Social Signals
welcome.step4.desc: Real information based on citizen reports to avoid delays and blockages.
